name:
THE DEDICATION OF (NOV 9)
THE LATERAN BASILICA [ABC]

readings.summary: The water from the temple brings life.

readings.citation:
Ps 46:2-3, 5-6, 8-9
The waters of the river gladden the city of God,
the holy dwelling of the Most High!
readings.antiphon:
Ps 46:2-3, 5-6, 8-9
The waters of the river gladden the city of God,
the holy dwelling of the Most High!

readings.summary: I have chosen and consecrated this house, says the Lord, that my name may be there forever.
Jesus drives the money-changers from the temple.

antiphons.text:
I saw the holy city, a new Jerusalem,
coming down out of heaven from God,
prepared like a bride adorned for her husband.

Behold God’s dwelling with the human race.
He will dwell with them and they will be his people,
and God himself with them will be their God.

Be built up like living stones,
into a spiritual house, a holy priesthood.
